note: AUD5 fix for finding F-07 (docs/novakai/audit/04-findings.md). SCOPE: CI wiring only — real verification is node --test tools/novakai/gate-parity.test.mjs (the no-path-filter test failed pre-fix).

intent.problem: attack A7: spec-gate.yml's paths: filter excluded .claude/** (the hooks), public/plan.json (the exact file cert/plan-check/acceptance target), .quiz-answers.json and root configs — commits touching only those never ran the gate.
intent.approach: drop the paths: filter entirely (the register's fail-closed option): every push and PR runs the gate; gate-parity.test.mjs asserts no paths: key exists in the workflow so a filter cannot silently return.
intent.rationale: enumerating missing paths re-creates the same hole one filename later; the repo is small enough that unconditional CI is cheap, and the test makes the choice self-enforcing.
